Label: PREVENTIVE CHECKLIST
Discription: Before submitting any drug claim, confirm:
Line 1: NDC captured directly from the administered vial or package label
Line 2: J-code validated against NDC using a current, reliable crosswalk
Line 3: 10-digit NDC converted to 11-digit format (5-4-2) if applicable
Line 4: N4 qualifier formatted with no space before the NDC number
Line 5: Manufacturer-specific NDC confirmed (not from a different lot or supplier)
Line 6: JW modifier applied on a separate line with administered quantity on primary line (if wastage applies)
Line 7: NDC confirmed as active on the date of service
Line 8: Claim run through edits before submission

Label: PREVENTIVE CHECKLIST
Discription: Before submitting any drug claim, confirm:
Line 1: UOM captured from the actual vial or package label on the date of service
Line 2: Drug form confirmed (powder → UN, liquid → ML, cream/ointment → GR, biologic IU → F2)
Line 3: Quantity matches the UOM selected (actual mLs administered, actual units used, etc.)
Line 4: N4 qualifier formatted with no space before the NDC number
Line 5: UOM is consistent with the billed J-code and NDC
Line 6: JW wastage line (if applicable) uses the same UOM as the administered line
Line 7: Prior claim UOM not carried forward without re-verification
Line 8: Claim run through edits before submission
